mapper.select: SELECT * FROM BorrowApplications WHERE userId = #{userId} ORDER BY submitTime DESC
SELECT * FROM BorrowApplications WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY submitTime DESC
SELECT * FROM BorrowApplications WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY submitTime DESC
SELECT * FROM BorrowApplications WHERE status = 'approved' AND expectedReturnDate < NOW() ORDER BY expectedReturnDate ASC
SELECT * FROM BorrowApplications ORDER BY submitTime DESC
SELECT * FROM BorrowApplications WHERE userDepartment = #{department} ORDER BY submitTime DESC
SELECT * FROM BorrowApplications WHERE status = 'dept_approved' ORDER BY submitTime DESC
